title: Functional Models, Values, and Observable Effects
description: Refactor a mutable billing script whose hidden state makes reruns disagree. Learners cumulatively produce an effect map and behavior-preserving functional baseline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish value transformations from identity-changing commands in an execution trace.
Locate I/O, mutation, time, randomness, and exceptions and move them behind explicit boundaries.
Test whether an expression can be replaced by its value without changing program behavior.
